attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCPCT.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,-999) AS REBOK_RPRT_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REBOK_PGTMV_PTNR_CNTRY_PTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE,
ST.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL AS PARTNER_CERTIFICATION_CD
, PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
, PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
, PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS ST
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON ST.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT
ON ST.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  ST.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE ST.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'

UNION

SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCPCT.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,-999) AS REBOK_RPRT_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REBOK_PGTMV_PTNR_CNTRY_PTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE,
ST.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL AS PARTNER_CERTIFICATION_CD
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS ST
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON ST.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT
ON ST.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  ST.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE ST.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'

SELECT
EOEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOEP.POS_TRANS_ID
,EOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOEP.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOEP.SAV_ID
,EOEP.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOEP.START_DATE
,EOEP.STATUS_CODE
,EOEP.CREATION_DATE
,EOEP.USER_NAME
,EOEP.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOEP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOEP.BATCH_ID
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS EOEP
WHERE EOEP.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER' AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS SOEP
WHERE SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID=EOEP.POS_TRANS_ID
AND SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER')

SELECT
SOEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID
,SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOEP.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOEP.SAV_ID
,SOEP.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOEP.START_DATE
,SOEP.STATUS_CODE
,SOEP.CREATION_DATE
,SOEP.USER_NAME
,SOEP.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOEP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOEP.BATCH_ID
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS SOEP
WHERE SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER' AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_REBOK_PGTMV_ENRCH_POS_TRX_LN WGAP
WHERE WGAP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID)
